nasb.text: Then the Philistines took the ark of God and brought it to the house of Dagon and set it by Dagon.

esv.text: Then the Philistines took the ark of God and brought it into the house of Dagon and set it up beside Dagon.

cnv.text: 非利士人搶去　神的約櫃，把它抬進大袞廟，放在大袞神像的旁邊。

ccb.text: 把它抬进大衮庙，放在大衮神像旁边。
